candidates.name: core
candidates.description: :house_with_garden: Open source home automation that puts local control and privacy first.
candidates.score_reason: Pilier domotique self-hosted, Python asyncio, intégration totale, parfait fit profil souveraineté.

candidates.name: Ollama – Run LLMs on your Mac
candidates.description: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.6, GLM-5.1, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.
candidates.score_reason: Self-hosting IA pure-play. Go + écosystème modèles. Standard de facto IA locale.

candidates.name: Infisical – open-source secrets manager
candidates.description: Infisical is the open-source platform for secrets, certificates, and privileged access management.
candidates.score_reason: Secrets management critique, TypeScript/Go, CLI hardcore. Self-hosting + sovereignty core values match parfait.

candidates.name: Tasmota
candidates.description: Alternative firmware for ESP8266 and ESP32 based devices with easy configuration using webUI, OTA updates, automation using timers or rules, expandability and entirely local control over MQTT, HTTP, Serial or KNX. Full documentation at
candidates.score_reason: Firmware ESP bare-metal, C, automate IoT devices, fondation domotique, très applicable.

candidates.name: Coroot – eBPF-based, open source observability with actionable insights
candidates.description: Coroot is an open-source observability and APM tool with AI-powered Root Cause Analysis. It combines metrics, logs, traces, continuous profiling, and SLO-based alerting with predefined dashboards and inspections.
candidates.score_reason: APM/RCA complet, Go natif, alerting avancé. Souveraineté + DevOps = match parfait profil.

candidates.name: Octelium – FOSS Alternative to Teleport, Cloudflare, Tailscale, Ngrok
candidates.description: A next-gen FOSS self-hosted unified zero trust secure access platform that can operate as a remote access VPN, a ZTNA platform, API/AI/MCP gateway, a PaaS, an ngrok-alternative and a homelab infrastructure.
candidates.score_reason: Go + VPN + ZTA + homelab : alignement parfait. Souveraineté numérique, sécurité, self-hosting clé

candidates.name: frigate
candidates.description: NVR with realtime local object detection for IP cameras
candidates.score_reason: IA locale+caméras IP, TypeScript, Coral TPU, compl Home Assistant, cas d'usage concret.

candidates.name: HyperDX – open-source dev-friendly Datadog alternative
candidates.description: Resolve production issues, fast. An open source observability platform unifying session replays, logs, metrics, traces and errors powered by ClickHouse and OpenTelemetry.
candidates.score_reason: Plateforme unifiée traces/logs/replays, TypeScript familiar. ClickHouse robuste, edge case réel.

candidates.name: CLI tool for saving web pages as a single file
candidates.description: ⬛️ CLI tool and library for saving complete web pages as a single HTML file
candidates.score_reason: Rust + souveraineté numérique = alignement parfait. Utile pour archivage perso offline.

candidates.name: Pangolin – Open source alternative to Cloudflare Tunnels
candidates.description: Identity-aware VPN and tunneled reverse proxy for remote access based on WireGuard®.
candidates.score_reason: VPN identity-aware TypeScript, WireGuard, remote access sécurisé, complémentaire self-hosting.

candidates.name: A CLI tool I made to self-host any app with two commands on a VPS
candidates.description: Bare metal to production ready in mins; your own fly server on your VPS.
candidates.score_reason: Self-hosting VPS directement pertinent. Simplifie déploiement perso/client significativement.

candidates.name: Find the best local LLM for your hardware, ranked by benchmarks
candidates.description: Find the local LLM that actually runs and performs best on your hardware. Ranked by real, recency-aware benchmarks, not parameter count. One command, run it instantly.
candidates.score_reason: Benchmarking CLI pour IA locale aligné valeurs. Manque intégration DevOps/monitoring.

candidates.name: Willow – Open-source privacy-focused voice assistant hardware
candidates.description: Open source, local, and self-hosted Amazon Echo/Google Home competitive Voice Assistant alternative
candidates.score_reason: Voice assistant local C/ESP-ADF, alternative souveraine Echo, intéressant mais immature encore.

candidates.name: Trench – Open-source analytics infrastructure
candidates.description: Trench — Open-Source Analytics Infrastructure. A single production-ready Docker image built on ClickHouse, Kafka, and Node.js for tracking events. Easily build product analytics dashboards, LLM RAGs, observability platforms, or any other analytics product.
candidates.score_reason: Stack Rust-compatible, self-hosting viable. Analytics overkill pour usage perso, mais excellent pour infra perso.

candidates.name: Tailsnitch – A security auditor for Tailscale
candidates.description: A security auditor for Tailscale configurations. Scans your tailnet for misconfigurations, overly permissive access controls, and security best practice violations.
candidates.score_reason: Tailscale power user → audit tailnet configs. Niche mais très pertinent pour self-hosting sécurisé.

candidates.name: Linux server monitoring web dashboard
candidates.description: A beautiful web dashboard for Linux
candidates.score_reason: Dashboard Linux élégant, parfait self-hosting. Maintenance incertaine, peu d'évolution récente.

candidates.name: Tracecat – Open-source security alert automation / SOAR alternative
candidates.description: Open-source security automation platform for teams and AI agents
candidates.score_reason: Automation intéressante, mais Python/LLM moins aligné stack Rust. SOC teams focus, moins perso.

candidates.name: Online database diagram editor
candidates.description: Free, simple, and intuitive online database diagram editor and SQL generator.
candidates.score_reason: Utile pour schemas DB, mais peu innovant. Alternatives existantes (pgAdmin, DBeaver). Self-hosting limité.

candidates.name: Rivet – Open-source game server management with Nomad and Rust
candidates.description: Rivet Actors are the primitive for stateful workloads. Built for AI agents, collaborative apps, and durable execution.
candidates.score_reason: Rust + actors intéressant, mais cloud-natif/serverless moins aligné souveraineté numérique self-hosted

candidates.name: Nxtscape – an open-source agentic browser
candidates.description: 🌐 The open-source Agentic browser; alternative to ChatGPT Atlas, Perplexity Comet, Dia.
candidates.score_reason: TypeScript intéressant mais positionnement flou. Pas clair vs ChatGPT Atlas concurrence.

candidates.name: Boltstream – Self-hosted full end-to-end live video streaming platform
candidates.description: Boltstream Live Video Streaming Website + Backend
candidates.score_reason: Stack Python solide pour streaming, utile homelab mais éloigné de ses stacks principales Rust/TS

candidates.name: Cactus – Ollama for Smartphones
candidates.description: Low-latency AI engine for mobile devices & wearables
candidates.score_reason: Edge AI ARM intéressant mais niche mobile/wearables. Peu applicable quotidien dev.

candidates.name: Killport – CLI tool to kill processes running on a specified port
candidates.description: A command-line tool to kill processes and containers running on specified ports.
candidates.score_reason: Rust CLI utile mais cas d'usage limité. Résout un problème mineur du quotidien dev.

candidates.name: OpenLLMetry – OpenTelemetry-based observability for LLMs
candidates.description: Open-source observability for your GenAI or LLM application, based on OpenTelemetry
candidates.score_reason: Observabilité LLM spécialisée. Moins pertinent : peu d'usage GenAI en stack perso actuelle.

candidates.name: FreeCAD
candidates.description: Official source code of FreeCAD, a free and opensource multiplatform 3D parametric modeler.
candidates.score_reason: fallback

candidates.name: Marlin
candidates.description: Marlin is a firmware for RepRap 3D printers optimized for both 8 and 32 bit microcontrollers.  Marlin supports all common platforms.   Many commercial 3D printers come with Marlin installed.  Check with your vendor if you need source code for your specific machine.
candidates.score_reason: fallback

candidates.name: OrcaSlicer
candidates.description: G-code generator for 3D printers (Bambu, Prusa, Voron, VzBot, RatRig, Creality, etc.)
candidates.score_reason: fallback

candidates.name: openscad
candidates.description: OpenSCAD - The Programmers Solid 3D CAD Modeller
candidates.score_reason: fallback

candidates.name: Cura
candidates.description: 3D printer / slicing GUI built on top of the Uranium framework
candidates.score_reason: fallback

candidates.name: Self-hosted offline Internet from your browsing history
candidates.description: Show HN: Self-hosted offline Internet from your browsing history
candidates.score_reason: Concept intéressant mais très niche, peu de maintenance visible, valeur pratique limitée

candidates.name: A terminal emulator in pure PHP
candidates.description: A terminal renderer written in pure PHP.
candidates.score_reason: Terminal renderer PHP trop niche, peu d'utilité quotidienne pour stack fullstack actuelle
